reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la caja del serviclub. Tienen 2 pero siempre atienden por una sola y se junta gente y la espera es muy engorrosa

(Translated by Google)
The Serviclub checkout is very slow. They have two, but they always serve only one, and people gather there, making the wait very cumbersome.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención el la playa, en el bar modernizado para desayunar esta bien.
El área de talleres me dijo a sensación de abandono y perdida de calidad en el servicio hacia el socio.

(Translated by Google)
Good service on the beach, and the modernized breakfast bar is fine.
The workshop area left me with a feeling of neglect and a loss of quality in the service to members.

reviews.comment:
Va bien el lavadero automatico, cumple su funcion. La parte del secado y aspirado no es el mejor, pero lo deja limpio. No se puede comparar contra un lavadero manual, pero sirve para tener el auto limpio y cuando uno esta cerca y sin tanto tiempo. Los precios son para socios y no socios.
Dejo los precios y horarios al dia de hoy 17/01/23.

(Translated by Google)
The automatic car wash works well; it does its job. The drying and vacuuming aren't the best, but they get the car clean. It can't be compared to a manual car wash, but it's useful for keeping your car clean when you're nearby and don't have much time. Prices are for members and non-members.
I'm posting the prices and hours as of today, January 17, 2023.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeHVUeXVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tuve buena experiencia. El servicio es rápido pero no limpian en detalle. Además me cobraron dos veces el lavado. No me parece apropiado que te pidan la tarjeta de crédito y se la lleven fuera de los ojos del cliente. Estoy esperando que me contacten para devolver lo que corresponde. Nadie atiende el teléfono!!

(Translated by Google)
I didn't have a good experience. The service is quick, but they don't clean thoroughly. They also charged me twice for the wash. I don't think it's right that they ask for my credit card and then take it away from me. I'm waiting for them to contact me so I can get a refund. No one answers the phone!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaHFQalRBEAE
